message.content:
@startuml
title フィールド選択シーケンス図

actor ユーザ as User
participant Manager as Manager
participant FieldModel as FieldModel
participant FieldSelectPresenter as FieldSelectPresenter
participant FieldSelectView as FieldSelectView

User -> Manager : (Child Component)
Manager -> FieldModel : Instantiate()
Manager -> FieldSelectPresenter : Initialized()
FieldSelectPresenter -> FieldSelectView : (Child Component)
FieldSelectPresenter -> FieldModel : Fields
FieldSelectView -> FieldSelectPresenter : Initialized()

opt [フィールド選択時]
User -> FieldSelectView : フィールド選択
FieldSelectView -> FieldSelectPresenter : OnSelectedField()

opt [ランダムボタン押下時]
User -> FieldSelectView : ランダムボタン押下
FieldSelectView -> FieldSelectPresenter : OnSelectedRundom()
FieldSelectPresenter -> FieldSelectView : OnSelectedRundom()

@enduml
